statement.en: Evaluating the cardio-protective effects of Momordica balsamina in a diet-induced prediabetic rats.
statement.summary: M. balsamina coupled with or without dietary intervention decreased the risk of developing cardiac injury, thus preventing cardiovascular disease in prediabetes. Therefore, this medicinal plant may be a beneficial therapeutic agent in the prevention of prediabetic cardiovascular complications.

proposer: Bongiwe Khumalo, Angezwa Siboto, Akinjide Moses Akinnuga et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Study presents preliminary experimental findings (rat model, 2026 publication date suggests recent/preprint status) on phytotherapeutic efficacy. Results show promise but require validation through clinical trials, mechanistic confirmation, and peer review completion. Classification as FLOWING reflects provisional therapeutic claim pending independent replication and human-subject evidence.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 苦瓜のエッセンスは、血糖と心傷害を引き離す見えない比率を持つ。
